Requirement: User must be able to log in with valid credentials
System must reject invalid username/password combinations
System must show error when login fields are empty
Locked-out users must not be able to access the application
Error messages must be dismissible
Password field must mask input characters
All available products must be displayed on the inventory page
Each product must display name, image, description, price, and action button
Clicking a product must navigate to its detail page
Products must be sortable by Name (A-Z)
Products must be sortable by Name (Z-A)
Products must be sortable by Price (Low to High)
Products must be sortable by Price (High to Low)
Adding a product to cart must update the cart badge count
Multiple products must be addable to the cart
Cart must display all added products with correct details
Products must be removable from the cart
Cart must persist when navigating between pages
Continue Shopping must return user to the product listing
User must be able to initiate checkout from the cart
Checkout form must accept valid first name, last name, and postal code
Checkout must validate First Name is not empty
Checkout must validate Last Name is not empty
Checkout must validate Postal Code is not empty
Checkout overview must display correct item total
Checkout overview must display correct tax amount
Checkout grand total must equal item total plus tax
Checkout must display payment and shipping information
Completing checkout must display order confirmation page
Back Home must navigate to inventory after order confirmation
User must be able to cancel checkout at Step 1
User must be able to cancel checkout at Step 2
User must be able to log out via the sidebar menu
Authenticated pages must not be accessible after logout via browser back
Sidebar menu must display all navigation options
All Items menu option must navigate to inventory
Reset App State must clear the cart
Error messages must display with correct red styling
All buttons and elements must be properly aligned
Cart icon must be visible on all authenticated pages
